title: Sampling and Data
description: How to collect representative samples, classify data, and summarise a data set using measures of location, spread and outliers.
objectives: Describe and compare sampling methods: simple random, stratified, systematic, opportunity and quota sampling
Classify data as qualitative or quantitative, and as discrete, continuous or categorical
Calculate the mean, median and mode from raw data and from a frequency table
Calculate the range, interquartile range, variance and standard deviation of a data set
Identify outliers using the 1.5 x IQR rule and interpret a box plot
